name: beui-hold-action
title: Hold Action
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Confirms a deliberate action only after a continuous pointer or keyboard hold.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Made the horizontal fill grow from the logical inline start and mirrored its wave in RTL.
Guarded pointer capture when synthetic accessibility input has no active pointer.

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports, made the horizontal fill direction-aware, and guarded pointer capture.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable while preserving correct progress direction in RTL interfaces.
